data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Predicts the time required to move to a target area.
data.technical_spec: Optimizes button sizes and their placement to enhance usability.

data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: Describes the time it takes to make a decision based on the choices available.
data.technical_spec: Simplifies UI by reducing choice overload.

data.title: Aesthetic-Usability Effect
data.description: Users perceive aesthetically pleasing design as more usable.
data.technical_spec: Employs clean typography and a soothing color palette.

data.title: Jakob's Law
data.description: States users spend most time on other sites and prefer consistency.
data.technical_spec: Adopts conventional design patterns to enhance familiarity.

data.title: Law of Proximity
data.description: Items close to each other are perceived as a group.
data.technical_spec: Groups related functions and content to improve navigation.
